@if (buttonLabel()) {
}
@for (input of data()?.inputs; track $index) {
@switch (input.type) { @case (filterFieldType.Default) {
} @case (filterFieldType.Input) {
} @case (filterFieldType.Date) {
} @case (filterFieldType.DateBase) {
} @case (filterFieldType.Select) {

} @if (canResizeRight(input.resizeNameColumn || input.name)) {
} }
}
